SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: PRE_ICL_INNPP_COPAY_3M 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: Plans that use a coinsurance percentage amount rather than a co-payment amount will not have a 
value in this field; see instead the corresponding coinsurance variable called 
(PRE_ICL_INNPP_COINS_3M).
